memory.title: Memory notes
memory.subtitle: Fill in once — every tool uses this to personalise outputs for you.

spec.title: Spec writer
spec.subtitle: Describe a feature → engineering-ready spec.
spec.placeholder: e.g. Add a rate limiting dashboard so API customers can see their real-time usage, remaining quota, and reset times...

prd.title: PRD generator
prd.subtitle: One-liner → full product requirements doc, exec-ready.
prd.placeholder: e.g. Build a self-service API key management portal so developers can create, rotate, and revoke keys without contacting support

meeting.title: Meeting → action items
meeting.subtitle: Paste messy notes → structured decisions, owners, and action items.
meeting.placeholder: Paste your raw meeting notes here — however messy...

okr.title: OKR builder
okr.subtitle: Focus areas → well-formed OKRs with measurable key results.
okr.placeholder: e.g. Improve API reliability, Grow developer adoption, Reduce support ticket volume

competitive.title: Competitive analysis
competitive.subtitle: Your product + competitors → structured comparison with positioning gaps.
competitive.productPlaceholder: e.g. Buildings API — geospatial data platform for developers
competitive.competitorsPlaceholder: e.g. Google Maps API, Geocodio, HERE API
competitive.dimensionsPlaceholder: e.g. pricing, accuracy, DX, latency, enterprise features

interview.title: Interview question bank
interview.subtitle: Generate tailored PM interview questions with what-good-looks-like guidance.
interview.rolePlaceholder: e.g. Platform PM, AI PM, Senior PM at a fintech
interview.focusPlaceholder: e.g. API infrastructure, developer tools, growth
interview.hint: Uses your memory notes if saved

changelog.title: Changelog writer
changelog.subtitle: List of changes → polished user-facing release notes.
changelog.inputLabel: What shipped (paste git diff, bullet list, or free text)
changelog.placeholder:
e.g.
- Re-architected geocoder with 8-strategy fallback
- Added token-scoped dashboards
- Fixed rate limit bug

pricing.title: Pricing copy generator
pricing.subtitle: Your tiers + features → conversion-optimised pricing page copy.
pricing.productPlaceholder: e.g. Buildings API — geospatial data for developers
pricing.tiersPlaceholder:
e.g.
Free: 1K calls/mo, basic geocoding
Pro $49/mo: 50K calls, fallback engine
Enterprise: custom volume, SLA

risk.title: Risk register
risk.subtitle: Paste a spec → structured risk log with severity, probability, and mitigations.
risk.inputLabel: Paste your spec or feature description
risk.placeholder: Paste any functional spec, PRD, or feature description...

diff.title: Spec diff viewer
diff.subtitle: Compare two spec versions — see what changed, improved, or regressed.

diagram.title: Flow diagram generator
diagram.subtitle: Describe any flow → Mermaid diagram instantly.
diagram.placeholder: e.g. User onboarding: sign up → email verification → profile setup → first API call → success

csv.title: CSV analyser
csv.subtitle: Upload a CSV → PM-ready insights.
csv.dropText: Drop CSV or click to browse

prompts.title: Prompt library
prompts.subtitle: Save your best prompts. Apply them to any tool instantly.
prompts.namePlaceholder: Prompt name (e.g. My API rate limit spec)

history.title: History
history.subtitle: All outputs saved locally. Reload any instantly.
